items.title: Mexican drug lord 'El Mencho' buried in golden coffin
items.dek: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes led the feared Jalisco New Generation Cartel until his death during a firefight in February.
items.body: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes led the feared Jalisco New Generation Cartel until his death during a firefight in February.

items.title: US nationals urged to leave Middle East as conflict spreads
items.dek: The US State Department says Americans should "depart now via commercial means" as strikes continue.
items.body: The US State Department says Americans should "depart now via commercial means" as strikes continue.
